hero.title: Fastest file transfer on this planet
hero.description: Direct, encrypted file transfers from your devices to anyone, anywhere - no accounts, no cloud storage in between.
hero.airdropQuote: Think of it like AirDrop for any device, any network.
hero.donationMessage: Your donations make this project better

step1.title: Start
step1.description: Pass/Drop/Select a file or folder you want to share with AltSendme. It'll spit out a ticket.

step2.title: Paste
step2.description: copy-paste the ticket to your friend.
step2.message: hey here have some great photos: blobQmFoo...

step3.title: Download
step3.description: Run/Paste the ticket to fetch data directly from your friend.

private.title: Private & Encrypted
private.description: Files go straight to your friend: never stored anywhere online.

unlimited.title: Transfer Anything
unlimited.description: Send files or folders of any size or format reliably.

crossPlatform.title: Cross-Platform
crossPlatform.description: Works on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

testimonial.quote: A very straightforward file transfer app. Great for quick, simple file transfers across the web.

desktop.description: Native apps for Windows, macOS, and Linux. Drag, drop, and share files instantly with a full desktop experience.

faq1.question: What is AltSendme and how does it work?
faq1.answer: AltSendme is a minimal, cross-platform desktop application that lets users send files and directories peer-to-peer anywhere in the world. It is built around the <link>Iroh networking stack</link> and uses open-source public connection relays to perform advanced techniques like NAT traversal and hole punching to reach the destination.

faq2.question: Is AltSendme free to use?
faq2.answer: Yes, AltSendme currently has no infrastructure costs. If you benefit from this work, consider supporting the developer through Buy Me a Coffee or GitHub Sponsors.

faq3.question: What file types can I transfer with AltSendme?
faq3.answer: You can transfer anything—images, videos, documents, and more. Integrity checks are performed on both ends, so your files are automatically verified for correctness during both sending and receiving.

faq4.question: How secure is my data when using AltSendme?
faq4.answer: AltSendme uses strong end-to-end encryption based on modern standards like TLS 1.3 and QUIC, ensuring that only you and the recipient can access your data. It provides forward and backward secrecy, so even if tickets are exposed, past and future transfers remain secure.

faq5.question: How does it compare to FilePizza, Wormhole, and PairDrop?
faq5.answer: AltSendme offers a better file-sharing experience than other p2p web-only tools. By leveraging QUIC over UDP, it enables faster, resilient peer-to-peer transfers with built-in encryption, authentication, and stream multiplexing. It allows sending large files and full folders with pause/resume support and fewer browser limitations. Additionally, integrity and cryptographic operations are optimized for speed, making AltSendme a reliable choice for verified transfers.

faq6.question: Do I need an internet connection to use AltSendme?
faq6.answer: Yes, a network connection is required because the devices must connect to each other. If both devices are on the same local network (e.g., the same Wi-Fi), full internet access is not necessary—just LAN connectivity. However, if devices are on different networks behind NATs or firewalls, an internet connection is required for hole punching or relay fallback.

meta.title: Send files anywhere | Frictionless, Fast, Private, Unlimited and Free
meta.description: AltSendme is a frictionless peer-to-peer file transfer cross-platform desktop application. Open-source blip-alternative, Available for Windows, macOS, and Linux.
